title: Installer TUI UX/runtime fixes for 0.3.2
acceptanceCriteria: Telegram token field shows masked preview while persisting raw secret only.
Installer final/result status is normalized across success, warnings, recoverable failures, and fatal failures without contradictory UI or dead-end close behavior.
Interactive and structured installer paths remain installer-native, recoverable, and consistent for warning-only Telegram lookup failures and invalid incomplete data.
Release metadata and proof bundle are updated for 0.3.2 with required verification evidence.
